message:
feat(fsqlite-mvcc): history compression & merge certificates (bd-c6tx)

Implement §5.10.6-5.10.8: PageHistory objects (compressed version chains),
intent commutativity (trace-monoid independence relation I_intent with
column-level UpdateExpression refinement and join-max exception for
AUTOINCREMENT), canonical Foata normal form, MergeCertificate generation
and verification, and circuit breaker on verification failure.

14 tests (8 required + 6 edge cases), 646 total mvcc tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
